moves_today: Reach out to US EMBASSY SINGAPORE to discuss Event Planning Services for the Independence Day Celebration.
Contact DELTA DORE TECHNOLOGIES to discuss recent award of 9483876.74 for GEOSPATIAL SERVICES AND TECHNICAL SUPPORT.
Monitor recent award of 8590040.0 to CORELOGIC SOLUTIONS, LLC for CORELOGIC GEOSPATIAL SOFTWARE AND DATA SERVICES FOR PROPERTY STRUCTURE AND LOCATION INFORMATION, CRI.
top_3: Pursue the Sources Sought for AI Model Hosting and Inference because it aligns with EDF's earth observation data capabilities.
Target the Sources Sought for AN/USC-28(V) Satellite Communication Sets (SCS) because it could utilize EDF's satellite imagery.
Flag the Sources Sought for TMC Program because it may require EDF's geospatial analysis services.
contacts: Contact DELTA DORE TECHNOLOGIES to discuss recent award of 9483876.74 for GEOSPATIAL SERVICES AND TECHNICAL SUPPORT.

Reach out to SCIENCE APPLICATIONS INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION to discuss recent award of 17641501.32 for THE DEPARTMENT OF THE INTERIOR (DOI) HAS PREPARED THIS DAY ONE USE CASE TO SUPPORT THE OFFICE OF THE.
dept_moves: The Navy and Marine Corps put amphibious readiness on the front burner, indicating a potential increase in demand for EDF's earth observation data.
The Pentagon and FAA agree to conduct anti-drone laser tests in New Mexico, suggesting a growing need for EDF's geospatial analysis services.
competitive: Maxar received 2298528.56 from DoD for HIGH RESOLUTION SATELLITE IMAGERY FOR SELECT AREAS OF INTEREST (AOI), highlighting the competitive landscape in satellite imagery.
Maxar received 1399933.0 from DoD for ASTRO-ROVER MAINTENANCE - OTD/TTU, emphasizing the need for EDF to stay competitive in the geospatial services market.
vehicles: EDF can leverage the SEWP V contract vehicle to pursue the Sources Sought for AN/USC-28(V) Satellite Communication Sets (SCS).
EDF can use the DIU OTA contract vehicle to target the Sources Sought for TMC Program.
